subcodes.first_line: O my God, my generous Lord and my glorious Master! These two are indeed servants, prostrate and humble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و ربی الکریم و مولائی العظیم ان هذین لعبدان ساجدان خاضعان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
